evals.prompt: Add a tool that lets users ask questions about our ETL run history — things like 'how many runs failed last week' or 'show me the slowest runs'
evals.expected_output: Creates a new agent with a different system prompt (etl_runs schema), reuses the ToolLoopAgent pattern and sql-safety module, adds a new query tool pointing at the etl_runs table

evals.prompt: I want to add a second data source — a PostgreSQL database with customer info. Users should be able to ask questions that join across both BigQuery and Postgres
evals.expected_output: Explains that multi-source joins require either federated queries (BigQuery external connections) or a multi-tool agent with separate query tools for each database. Recommends the appropriate approach.

evals.prompt: The bot sometimes generates SQL that references columns that don't exist. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Points to the system prompt as the fix — improve column descriptions, add more few-shot examples, or add explicit 'do not use these column names' rules. Also mentions the agent self-corrects on query errors.
